channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: When you build with the Deep Research agent, you’re tapping into the same autonomous infrastructure ...
item.description:
When you build with the Deep Research agent, you’re tapping into the same autonomous infrastructure that powers Google’s most popular products, like the @GeminiApp, @NotebookLM, Search and Google Finance.
Both agents are available starting today in public preview via the Gemini API (coming soon to startups and enterprises via @GoogleCloud).
Learn more ↓ https://t.co/77kO6fBZ5p
--- @Google | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @Google

item.title: We’ve expanded the capabilities of Deep Research and Deep Research Max to give you even more control...
item.description:
We’ve expanded the capabilities of Deep Research and Deep Research Max to give you even more control and transparency over the entire research process:
📋 Collaborative Planning: Review and refine the agent's research plan before it executes.
🛠️ Extended Tooling: Run Google Search, MCP servers, URL context, Code Execution and File Search simultaneously — or turn off web access entirely to exclusively search through your custom data.
🎥 Multimodal Inputs: Base the agent's research on your own PDFs, CSVs, audio, video, and images.
📊 Native Charts & Infographics: Generate high-quality visuals (via HTML or Nano Banana 2) to dynamically enrich your reports.
💭 Real-Time Streaming: Track the agent's live reasoning steps, and receive text and image outputs as they’re generated.
--- @Google | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 0
item.author: @Google

item.title: The next evolution of our autonomous research agent is here. Today, we’re introducing Deep Research ...
item.description:
The next evolution of our autonomous research agent is here. Today, we’re introducing Deep Research and Deep Research Max via the Gemini API.
Powered by Gemini 3.1 Pro, you can now trigger comprehensive research workflows with unprecedented control and transparency, featuring:
🔌 Arbitrary MCP support 📊 Native infographic & chart generation 🌐 Fully cited reports grounded in the open web + your own files and data
All from a single API call. Meet the new agent 🧵↓
--- @Google | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 0
item.author: @Google

item.title:
✨ Integrated Hoodmaps now into my new site https://t.co/kSbsCmuvBO
I started it 2 years ago but fi...
item.description:
✨ Integrated Hoodmaps now into my new site https://t.co/kSbsCmuvBO
I started it 2 years ago but finally working on it again
It's a hotel booking site with hotels rated by AI to avoid all the fake reviews and paid listings of modern booking sites
Any way, if you zoom in to any city, it'll pull the Hoodmaps neighborhood data, so you can stay in the cool area, not the tourist area or the crime area!
Let me know what you think 😊
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 280
item.author: @levelsio

item.title: Deep Research now includes arbitrary MCP support to securely connect and analyze your own or third p...
item.description:
Deep Research now includes arbitrary MCP support to securely connect and analyze your own or third party data.
Plus, it’s our first research agent to natively generate presentation-ready visuals that bring data to life.
Start building via the Gemini API → https://t.co/1GnisEFViA
--- @GoogleDeepMind | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 753
item.author: @GoogleDeepMind

item.title: 🔵 Deep Research: Optimized for speed and efficiency. Perfect for interactive apps needing quicker re...
item.description:
🔵 Deep Research: Optimized for speed and efficiency. Perfect for interactive apps needing quicker responses.
🔵 Deep Research Max: It uses extra time to search and reason. Ideal for exhaustive context gathering and tasks happening in the background. https://t.co/FFM4xOPdAi
--- @GoogleDeepMind | ❤️ 12 | 🔁 1 | 💬 1 | 👁 955
item.author: @GoogleDeepMind

item.title: Deep Research and Deep Research Max are our latest autonomous research agents powered by Gemini 3.1 ...
item.description:
Deep Research and Deep Research Max are our latest autonomous research agents powered by Gemini 3.1 Pro.
They can safely navigate both the web and your custom data, like internal docs and specialized financial information, to create professional-grade, fully cited reports. 🧵
--- @GoogleDeepMind | ❤️ 61 | 🔁 7 | 💬 4 | 👁 1221
item.author: @GoogleDeepMind

item.description:
Binance TradFi Futures Sprint is now live.
Trade Gold, Silver, and popular Stock/ETF Futures for a chance to share a prize pool of up to 1.44M USDT!
Join now → https://t.co/SvACUI58HS https://t.co/Ci3IodSll6

item.author: @binance

item.title: Today, MIT & the IMO released MathNet, the world’s largest dataset of International Math Oly...
item.description:
Today, MIT &amp; the IMO released MathNet, the world’s largest dataset of International Math Olympiad problems &amp; solutions 🌍
MathNet is 5x larger than previous datasets &amp; is sourced from over 40 countries across 4 decades: https://t.co/vvojP7Fu9t https://t.co/qpuJOgmyfH
--- @MIT_CSAIL | ❤️ 36 | 🔁 13 | 💬 0 | 👁 1199
item.author: @MIT_CSAIL
